description: Welcome to Ten Oakes and this private 54 home community, located only a short walk to schools, trails and shopping. This air conditioned, efficient 3 bedroom 2.5 bathrooms home offers open living throughout the main floor with generous spaces for relaxing, cooking, entertaining and eating. Walk out from the main floor on to the private covered deck with greenspace that is complete with N/G hookups. Granite counters abound with room for four at the breakfast bar in the gourmet kitchen complete with gas top range. Custom cabinetry in living room provides for storage and computer nook area. Single car garage with lots of extra storage and extra parking on apron. Complex has playground, community garden and RV parking. This is a great place to raise a family.
